description: Enhance end-to-end validation tests to comprehensively cover the complete pipeline flow. The existing EndToEndFlowTest.java validates state chain ordering and error paths. Extend it to also validate: (1) the complete happy path including DynamoDB metadata record creation with output fields, (2) SNS notifications contain correct payloads for both success and failure, (3) retry configuration on all critical tasks, (4) the full input validation rejection flow verifying that the ValidationError Pass state injects correct error context for downstream tasks. Additionally, create a new ComprehensiveEndToEndTest.java that validates cross-cutting concerns: EventBridge triggers the state machine, Lambda has all required environment variables and permissions, state machine has proper IAM permissions for DynamoDB/SNS/Lambda, and the complete resource count is consistent.
steps: Read the existing src/test/java/com/myorg/EndToEndFlowTest.java to understand current coverage
Create src/test/java/com/myorg/ComprehensiveEndToEndTest.java following the existing test pattern (App, CdkBaseStack, Template.fromStack, ObjectMapper for state machine parsing)

Add test: testCompletePipelineResourceIntegrity - validates all expected resource types exist with correct counts (2 S3 buckets, 1 DynamoDB table, 1 state machine, 1 EventBridge rule, 2 SNS topics, 1 KMS key, 1+ Lambda functions, 2+ CloudWatch alarms, 1 dashboard)
Add test: testHappyPathDynamoDbUpdatesContainOutputMetadata - parse state machine def, verify UpdateMetadataStatus parameters include outputBucket, outputKey, outputUri from $.lambdaResult
Add test: testSuccessNotificationContainsAudioIdAndStatus - parse state machine def, verify PublishSuccessNotification message payload contains audioId and status=COMPLETED
Add test: testFailureNotificationContainsErrorDetails - parse state machine def, verify PublishFailureNotification message payload contains audioId, status=FAILED, error, and cause fields

Add test: testAllCriticalTasksHaveRetryConfiguration - verify PutMetadataRecord, ProcessAudioMetadata, UpdateMetadataStatus, PublishSuccessNotification, and PublishFailureNotification all have Retry blocks
Add test: testValidationErrorPassStateInjectsErrorContext - verify the ValidationError Pass state has Result with Error and Cause fields and resultPath $.error
Add test: testEventBridgeToStateMachineIntegration - verify the EventBridge rule target references the state machine ARN and uses $.detail input transformation
Add test: testStateMachineHasRequiredIamPermissions - verify IAM policies grant dynamodb:putItem, dynamodb:updateItem, sns:Publish, lambda:InvokeFunction scoped to resource ARNs
Run 'mvn test' to confirm all new tests pass alongside existing 96 tests
acceptance_criteria: A new ComprehensiveEndToEndTest.java file exists with at least 8 tests covering cross-cutting E2E validation
All new tests pass when running 'mvn test'
Total test count increases from 96 to at least 104
Tests verify real synthesized template content (not just string contains), using ObjectMapper JSON parsing where appropriate
verification: Run 'mvn test' and confirm all tests pass with 0 failures
Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth' and confirm it produces valid output
findings: CDK Java jsii binding expands IAM policy statement arrays into individual text-valued statements when accessed via template.findResources(). For example, ["dynamodb:putItem", "dynamodb:updateItem"] becomes two separate statements each with a text Action. Tests must check individual textual Action values rather than array matching.
